zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Corbet於1188年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，她的父親Sir Robert Corbet11185歲，母親Emma de Pantulf27歲。她於1199年之後與Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1251年在英國威爾斯享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Corbet于1188年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾时，她的父亲Sir Robert Corbet11185岁，母亲Emma de Pantulf27岁。她于1199年之后与Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1251年在英国威尔斯享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Corbet was born in 1188, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Corbet, was 11185 and her mother, Emma de Pantulf, was 27. She married Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog after 1199. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1251, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Corbet est née en 1188, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Corbet, avait 11185 ans et sa mère, Emma de Pantulf, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog après 1199. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1251, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Corbet 1188 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Corbet 11185 und ihre Mutter Emma de Pantulf 27. Sie hat nach 1199 Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1251 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Corbet è nata il nel 1188 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert Corbet, aveva 11185 anni e sua madre, Emma de Pantulf, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog dopo il 1199. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1251, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Corbet(이)가 1188년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Corbet(은)는 11185세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma de Pantulf(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1199년 이후 Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1251년 영국 웨일스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Corbet родилась в 1188 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Corbet было 11185 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Pantulf, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog после 1199 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1251 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Corbet nació en 1188, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Corbet, tenía 11185 años y su mamá, Emma de Pantulf, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog después de 1199. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1251, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
